postalAddress.value: Attn: New Zealand First, Free Post Parliament, Private Bag 18 888, Parliament Buildings, Wellington 6160
postalAddress.notes: Party contact page lists a Free Post Parliament address (likely suitable for writing to NZ First MPs when individual office address not listed).

donationMethod.notes: No obvious public method found for donating directly to David Wilson personally; NZ First has online donation page.

sourcesChecked.notes: Found NZ First Free Post Parliament postal address.
Bio page did not list a personal postal address; linked to party contact page.
Found NZ First online donation form (party donation channel).
